subcodes.first_line: In this Most Great Revelation, the bounty and mercy and loving-kindness of God—glorified be His majesty—hath reached such a station that the pens of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این ظهور اعظم فضل و رحمت و عنایت حق جل جلاله بمقامی رسیده که اقلام عالم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
